actor-token-portraits.Settings.UseDefaul: Enable this to stop Actor Token Portraits for your client only and use the default FoundryVTT Actor directory images instead.
actor-token-portraits.Settings.WildcardT: Choose how Actor Token Portraits should behave when an actor prototype token uses wildcard artwork.
Always use the first wildcard image
Always use a random wildcard image
actor-token-portraits.Settings.RespectDn: Only in dnd5e, limit token portrait replacement to actors with the DnD5e portrait toggle enabled. When disabled, Actor Token Portraits continues to replace portraits for all actors.
